Appearances:
Plaintiff Jackie Tom is present. Represented by Melissa Forbes.
Attorney Karen Uchiyama appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sean Starkey is present.
Attorney Matthew Valdez representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 26, 2015 remains on calendar.
